features: Great Value Set: The set contains 120 pieces girls hair clips in total, including 80 pcs solid-color clips, 40 pcs floral print clips.
Reliable Material: The metal hair clips are made of metal, which are easy to attach on hair and difficult to slip from the hair.
Hair Clips Size: The width of the cute hair clips is 0.55 inches and the length is 2 inches. Ideal for birthdays, parties, school activities, holidays and more.
Assorted Colors: Kids hair clips have bright colors, and its paint is not easy to come off. It makes your little girl stand out every day.
Lightweight and Portable: Snap hair clips are small and lightweight, making them easy to carry in a bag for on-the-go styling. CHOKING HAZARD-Small Parts. Not for children under 3 years old.
description: Product Description Funtopia is committed to providing premium fashionable hair accessories to girls and ladies over the globe. Why choose Funtopia 120 pcs Snap hair clips? Premium Material---Made of Lightweight and quality metal, small hair clips are not easy to rust and will not burden your girl's head. Long-lasting Color---Under normal using and storage conditions, the paint of snap barrettes are not easy to come off . Ideal Gift---The hair clips set is a amazing gift for birthday, graduation, Thanksgiving, Christmas and party etc. Specifications: Material: Metal Color: Solid and mixed colors Patterns: Flower, animals and fruits Hair Clips Length: 2 inches Hair Clips Width: 0.55 inches Package List: 120 pcs snap hair clips Ideal Size Comes with the popular size 5 cm, super cute and durable, an ideal snap hair clip set for kids, teens and women. Assorted Patterns and Colors The popular patterns with bright colors fit various kinds of outfits, hair colors and hairstyles. Gift Package Coming with a cute gift box, it is ideal for birthday gifts, party favors, school activities, encouragement prizes, surprise gift and more.
